title: Request Targets, Host Authority, Proxy Trust, and Client Identity · Type-System Trace: Express Request Field Meaning
summary: An origin trusts arbitrary Host and X-Forwarded values, builds reset links from the request, rate-limits the proxy address, and logs raw URLs containing secrets. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
